name: axis_srl_fifo
core_function: Small AXI-stream FIFO intended for LUT/SRL-style short-depth buffering with ready/valid handshakes.
algorithm: Favor this skill when the query mentions SRL, shift register, LUTRAM, shallow FIFO, or small depth.
structure: Store stream data in a packed shift-register array.
Shift entries toward the output on each accepted output transfer.
Append new input data at the current occupancy index.
Track occupancy with a small count register.
